steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
Add the two equations so the $y$-terms cancel:
$$(3y)+(-3y)=(7x+14)+(8x-26)$$

steps.title: Find the target value
steps.content:
Simplify the result:
$$0=15x-12$$
$$15x=12$$
The question asks for $60x$, which is $4$ times $15x$. Multiply both sides by $4$:
$$60x=48$$
The answer is D.
